title: DEBUG: Reward Test
text: A shimmering void presents itself. The laws of reality are suspended here. Every manner of reward hangs in the air, waiting to be claimed. Choose wisely — or just spam them all, this is a debug event.

choices.text: Gold, Fixed: Give 50 gold

step.body: Fifty gold coins materialize from thin air and clatter into the party's purse. Exactly fifty. Not one more, not one less. The void is precise.

choices.text: Gold, Random: Give 15–45 gold

step.body: A handful of gold rains down from nowhere. The party scrambles to collect it — somewhere between fifteen and forty-five coins, by rough count.

choices.text: Item, Fixed count: Give 2 camping_supplies

step.body: Two neatly bundled camping kits drop into existence at the party's feet. Someone in the void is a very organised packer.

choices.text: Item, Random count: Give 1–4 health_potion

step.body: Health potions tumble out of the ether in a clinking heap. Between one and four by the look of it — the void isn't great at counting.

choices.text: Pool, Fixed: Pick 1 item from pool — health_potion, camping_supplies, sharpening_stone, magical_dust

step.body: The void reaches into its supply cache and produces one item — chosen at random from a modest selection of useful supplies.

choices.text: Pool, Random count: Pick 1 item from pool, quantity 1–3

step.body: The void shakes its pockets loose. An item tumbles out — and then perhaps another, perhaps two more. It genuinely cannot decide on a quantity.

choices.text: XP: Give 100 XP to ALL party members

step.body: A ripple of understanding washes over the entire party. Each member feels sharper, more seasoned. One hundred experience points, distributed without fanfare.

choices.text: XP: Give 250 XP to a RANDOM party member

step.body: The void singles out one party member with a knowing glance and floods them with hard-earned insight. Two hundred and fifty experience points, yours to keep.

choices.text: XP: Force LEVEL UP on a random party member

step.body: The void reaches into one party member's potential and yanks. Whether they were ready or not, they are a level stronger now.

choices.text: XP: Force LEVEL UP on ALL party members

step.body: A blinding flash. Every member of the party stumbles, then straightens. Something fundamental has shifted in each of them. The void has seen fit to advance everyone.

choices.text: Heal, Flat: Heal ALL party members for 25 HP

step.body: A gentle warmth settles over the group. Cuts knit shut, bruises fade. Twenty-five hit points restored to every soul in the party.

choices.text: Heal, Full: Restore a RANDOM party member to max HP

step.body: The void selects one fortunate party member and mends them completely. Every wound, every ache — gone. They feel as though they just woke from a perfect night's sleep.

choices.text: Heal, Full: Restore ALL party members to max HP

step.body: A wave of restorative energy crashes over the entire party. Every wound seals. Every injury erased. The party stands at full strength, as if the road behind them never happened.

choices.text: Heal, Percent: Heal ALL party members for 50 percent of max HP

step.body: Half a restoration — efficient, if unspectacular. Fifty percent of each party member's maximum health trickles back into them, which is nothing to complain about.

choices.text: Heal, Percent: Heal a RANDOM party member for 30 percent of max HP

step.body: The void picks one party member at random and parcels out a modest but welcome healing — thirty percent of their maximum health, no more, no less.

choices.text: Char Item, Specific: Give iron_luck_charm — player assigns to a member

step.body: An Iron Luck Charm materialises in the air before you, spinning slowly. It hums with faint purpose. Someone in the party should carry this.

choices.text: Char Item, Random count: Give 1–2 dwarven_ale — player assigns to a member

step.body: One or two bottles of Dwarven Ale thud into existence, dark and frothy. Whoever carries these had better not drink them on watch.

choices.text: Char Item Pool: Random item from pool — iron_luck_charm, faerie_tea, warden_signet — player assigns

step.body: Something tumbles out of the void — an item of some worth, drawn at random from a small collection of curious things. Decide who will carry it.

choices.text: Item Choice, Specific, Grant ONE: Pick one of iron_luck_charm / faerie_tea / warden_signet

step.body: Three curious objects drift into view. They cannot all be carried. Choose one to keep.

choices.text: Item Choice, Specific, Grant ALL: Everyone gets iron_luck_charm AND faerie_tea

step.body: Two items materialise together — both are yours to distribute among the party.

choices.text: Item Choice, Pool draw 3, Grant ONE: Pick one from a pool of 3 random draws

step.body: The void draws three items from its cache and fans them out before you. Take one.

choices.text: Item Choice, Pool draw 2, Grant ALL: Both drawn items are awarded

step.body: The void pulls two items at random from its reserves. Both are yours — distribute them as you see fit.

choices.text: TRAIT: Give a random member the Werewolf's Curse

step.body: The moon hangs heavy. {member} feels something shift beneath their skin.

choices.text: TRAIT: Give the whole party Survivor's Bond

step.body: What you have endured together has forged something unbreakable between you.

choices.text: {slot0} volunteers — Natural Hunter (party slot 0)

step.body: {member} steps forward into the wilderness alone. They return changed — keen-eyed, feral grace.

choices.text: {slot1} volunteers — Natural Hunter (party slot 1)

step.body: {member} steps forward into the wilderness alone. They return changed — keen-eyed, feral grace.

choices.text: {slot2} volunteers — Natural Hunter (party slot 2)

step.body: {member} steps forward into the wilderness alone. They return changed — keen-eyed, feral grace.

choices.text: COMBO, Jackpot: All reward types fire at once

step.body: The void convulses. Gold rains. Supplies appear. The whole party gains experience. Someone gets healed. And something personal — a real item — materialises for one of your companions to claim. The debug gods are generous today.
